title: Phlegmariurus jaegeri
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus jaegeri is classified within the plant kingdom as a member of the division Lycopodiophyta, class Lycopodiopsida, and order Hymnales. It is further grouped into the family Hymenophyllaceae and the genus Phlegmariurus. Phlegmariurus jaegeri is a species of lycopod that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. The classification of Phlegmariurus jaegeri is based on its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants. This classification helps in understanding the plant's phylogenetic history and its place within the plant kingdom.
uses: Phlegmariurus jaegeri, a species of plant, has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties.
